lines.english: Have Mercy upon me, and bless me with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਉ ਹੋਈਐ ਰੇਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: tau kichh paaeeai jau hoeeai renaa |
lines.english: He alone obtains something, who becomes the dust under the feet of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥੨॥੮॥
lines.translit: jiseh bujhaae tis naam lainaa |1| rahaau |2|8|
lines.english: And he alone repeats the Naam, whom God causes to understand. ||1||Pause||2||8||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
And yet, around his neck, he hangs a stone god. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ghar meh tthaakur nadar na aavai |
lines.english: Within the home of his own self, he does not even come to see his Lord and Master.
The faithless cynic wanders around, deluded by doubt.
That stone, which he calls his god,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਰੁ ਬਿਰੋਲੈ ਖਪਿ ਖਪਿ ਮਰਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: neer birolai khap khap marataa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He churns water, and after wasting his life away, he dies. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਪਾਹਣੁ ਲੈ ਉਸ ਕਉ ਡੁਬਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ohu paahan lai us kau ddubataa |2|
lines.english: that stone pulls him down and drowns him. ||2||
a boat of stone will not carry you across. ||3||
O sinner, you are untrue to your own self;
Meeting the Guru, O Nanak, I know my Lord and Master.
The Perfect Architect of Destiny is pervading and permeating the water, the land and the sky. ||4||3||9||
How have you enjoyed your Dear Beloved?
Crimson, crimson, crimson
O sister, please teach me, please show me. ||1||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: apane preetam kai rang ratee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - this is the color of the soul-bride who is imbued with the Love of her Beloved. ||1||Pause||
I wash Your Feet with my eye-lashes.
Wherever You send me, there I will go. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਨਪਤੀ ਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eik nimakh milaavahu mohi praanapatee ree |3|
lines.english: if I could only meet the Lord of my life, for even an instant. ||3||
She who eradicates her self-conceit, power and arrogant intellect,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮ ਦੇਉ ਜਤੀ ਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam deo jatee ree |
lines.english: I would trade meditation, austerity, self-discipline and celibacy,
O Nanak, is the true soul-bride. ||4||4||10||
You are my Life, the very Support of my breath of life.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਪੇਖਿ ਪੇਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਧਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tujh hee pekh pekh man saadhaaraa |1|
lines.english: Gazing upon You, beholding You, my mind is soothed and comforted. ||1||
You are my Friend, You are my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਹਿ ਨ ਬਿਸਰਹਿ ਕਾਹੂ ਬੇਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chiteh na bisareh kaahoo beraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I shall never forget You. ||1||Pause||
You are my Great Lord and Master, the treasure of excellence. ||2||
Each and every instant, You dwell with them. ||3||
There are millions of servants in Your Court - Your Royal Darbaar.
I am Your indentured servant; I am Your slave.
Through and through, You abide with Nanak. ||4||5||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: hau kichh naahee sabh kichh teraa |
lines.english: I am nothing; everything is Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਮਹਲ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਊਚ ਦੁਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sookh mehal jaa ke aooch duaare |
lines.english: His Mansions are so comfortable, and His gates are so lofty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਕਥਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਅਤਿ ਮੀਠੀ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj kathaa prabh kee at meetthee |
lines.english: The Natural Speech of God is so very sweet.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
Within them, His beloved devotees dwell. ||1||
How rare is that person, who sees it with his eyes. ||1||Pause||
There, the Saints celebrate with their Lord. ||2||
There, in the arena of the congregation, the divine music of the Naad, the sound current, is sung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਨ ਹਰਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: teh maran na jeevan sog na harakhaa |
lines.english: Neither birth nor death is there, neither pain nor pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਹਜ ਕਥਾ ਇਹ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: guhaj kathaa ih gur te jaanee |
lines.english: From the Guru, I have come to know the mystery of this speech.
The Ambrosial Nectar of the True Name rains down there. ||3||
Nanak speaks the Bani of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||6||12||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਦਰਸਿ ਪਾਪ ਕੋਟਿ ਉਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai daras paap kott utaare |
lines.english: By the Blessed Vision of their Darshan, millions of sins are erased.
Meeting with them, this terrifying world-ocean is crossed over||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਮ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਚਿਤਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo ham kau har naam chitaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: who inspire me to remember the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||
They are my companions, and they are my dear friends,
When I serve Him, the Messenger of Death is chased away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਨਤ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa sabad sunat sukh saare |
lines.english: Hearing the Word of His Shabad, I am totally at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਧੀਰਕ ਇਸੁ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee dheerak is maneh sadhaare |
lines.english: His comfort and consolation soothes and supports my mind.
Remembering Him in meditation, my face is radiant and bright. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh ke sevak prabh aap savaare |
lines.english: God embellishes and supports His servants.
Nanak seeks the Protection of their Sanctuary; he is forever a sacrifice to them. ||4||7||13||
